---
title: "TBA"
author: 
  - name: Perry de Valpine
    affiliation: Department of Environmental Science, Policy & Management
date: '2026-03-30'
image: perry.jpg
categories: "Spring 2026"
css: /seminarentries/speakerpages.css
---

::::: columns
::: {.column width="60%"}
Abstract: TBA
:::

::: {.column width="40%"}
![{{< meta author >}}]({{< meta image >}})
:::

:::::
